arts.sum: Southampton vs Chelsea in the Premier League is scheduled to kick off at the slightly strange time of 7:30pm in the UK at St Mary's Stadium on Wednesday, December 4. Southampton, in contrast, have won once all season and sit bottom by four points heading into the midweek set of fixtures.

arts.sum: For Chelsea's fourth-round League Cup match at Newcastle, a game significantly harder than any other challenge put to the so-called 'B-team', Maresca stuck to his guns and chose not to use Cole Palmer and a host of Premier League regulars. Chelsea will play their first midweek Premier League fixture of the season on Wednesday night as they take on bottom of the table Southampton.

arts.ttl: We simulated Southampton vs Chelsea to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to continue their winning form later today when the Blues take on Southampton in the Premier League. Goals from Nicolas Jackson, Enzo Fernandez, and Cole Palmer handed Chelsea a convincing 3-0 win over Aston Villa in their last outing, with the Blues currently third in the Premier League, joint on points with second-placed Arsenal.
